alt: A mature male mandarinfish showcasing its elongated dorsal spine and compact body size
caption: They are small fish, reaching only about 6 cm (2.4 inches) in length, with males distinguished by a highly elongated first dorsal spine.
acquisitionNotes: Pristine 3848x3848 size profile highlighting male dorsal fin elongation. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/3c/Pez_mandar%C3%ADn_%28Synchiropus_splendidus%29%2C_Anilao%2C_Filipinas%2C_2023-08-24%2C_DD_208.jpg
